scripts.dev:mobile: pnpm --dir apps/mobile run kill && pnpm --filter mobile start
scripts.db:migrate: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && pnpm --filter @pocketdev/db exec drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:push: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && pnpm --filter @pocketdev/db exec drizzle-kit push
scripts.db:studio: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && pnpm --filter @pocketdev/db exec drizzle-kit studio
